title: Crispy Black Olives Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish made with crispy black olives, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the roasted garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the crispy black olives and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Add the Kung Pao sauce and stir-fry for another 1-2 minutes until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, if desired.
